title: Better Trims
description: Enhances some of the default armor trim palettes to be more colorful and vibrant!
body:
Better Trims refines Minecraft's armor trims by adjusting their colors and details to better reflect the materials they’re made from. Gold trims look richer, netherite trims are darker and sleeker, and iron trims feel more metallic. Some palette inconsistencies from the base game have been smoothed out, making every armor set look more consistent and intentional.

- Trim items have also been updated: materials like diamond and amethyst now feature more gem-like cores, giving them a subtle but noticeable visual upgrade.

- This pack stays close to vanilla style — it’s not a redesign, just a thoughtful polish for players who want cleaner, more believable armor trims.
- Should work for any version above 1.21.4, but has not been tested yet.
